name: 揮拳打人
description: Richard在發現Michelle被騷擾時揮拳打人，男性暴力作為「保護」的展示，在短劇中是常見的張力製造手段。
tags: 拳頭的衝擊力＋保護者姿態的荷爾蒙感

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Touch her again and I'll kill you. ... Dude, what the hell is even that? You're going to punch me for some... She's my wife.
examples.context: 拳頭的衝擊力＋保護者姿態的荷爾蒙感
